title: Ctrl+L to clear screen
description: Detect Ctrl+L in the input loop and emit \x1b[2J\x1b[H to clear the terminal. Standard terminal UX. Requires line-editing integration to intercept the keystroke before it reaches the line buffer.
close_reason: implemented in cli/src/commands.rs: /who, /me (CTCP ACTION), /cat (4KB text file), /! (shell stdout), /alias (contacts.json persistence), /clear; Ctrl+L handled natively by rustyline
